[[M'kim]] was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Thranta Rider]] who lived and worked on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]. In [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]] he saved [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo's]] life by catching him out of the sky when Jacen fell off Cloud City.

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Return to Ord Mantell]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
